page.content: At 12 Weeks, the Change In SPPB from baseline for ST is 1.0±1.9*, for PT is 1.0±1.5*, and for Controls is −0.5±1.9, with the Effect (Beta coefficient) for ST vs. control being 1.51 (P Value 0.005, CI 0.44, 2.58) and for PT vs. control being 1.61 (P Value 0.004, CI 0.48, 2.73). At 24 Weeks, ST shows a Change In SPPB of 0.0±3.5, PT is at 1.9±2.4, and Controls at 0.3±3.4, with the Effect (Beta coefficient) for ST vs. control at 0.16 (P Value 0.87, CI −1.86, 2.18) and for PT vs. control at 1.32 (P Value 0.20, CI −0.75, 3.40). At 36 Weeks, the Change In SPPB for ST is −0.2±3.9, for PT is 1.8±3.0, and for Controls is −0.5±4.1, with the Effect (Beta coefficient) for ST vs. control at 1.05 (P Value 0.34, CI −1.16, 3.25) and for PT vs.

page.content: control at 1.90 (P Value 0.10, CI −0.37, 4.17). In Table 2, Forage (fresh weight) yields an Average production of 9.7 ha-1, with a Farm-level selling price of 1.00 kg-1(a), a Cost of harvest/commercialization of 0.40 kg-1, a Gross value of 9,700 ha-1, a Total cost of harvest/commercialization of 3,880 ha-1, and a Net value of 5,820. Edible plants (quelites; fresh weight) produce 5 t ha-1, with a Farm-level selling price of 5.00 kg-1, a Cost of harvest/commercialization of 4.00 kg-1(b), a Gross value of 25,000 ha-1, a Total cost of harvest/commercialization of 20,000 ha-1, and a Net value of 5,000. Maize stover (dry weight) yields 3.7 t ha-1 with a Farm-level selling price of 1.00 kg-1, a Cost of harvest/commercialization of 8.50/25 kg (packing machine), a Gross value of 3,700 ha-1, a Total cost of harvest/commercialization of 1,300 ha-1, and a Net value of 2,400. Maize grain (dry weight) has an Average production of 1.5 t ha-1, a Farm-level selling price of 1.30 kg-1, a Cost of harvest/commercialization of 20.00 (harvest and degraining of 50 kg), a Gross value of 1,950 ha-1, a Total cost of harvest/commercialization of 600 ha-1, and a Net value of 1,350. The total cost of cultivation amounts to 14,570.00-2,500, with a net economic value of production of 12,070.00 (ca. 1150 US $).
